message:
Running command: # Check for a standalone verify tool / script
find /nc -name "verify*" -o -name "*verify*" 2>/dev/null | grep -v ipm | grep -v pycache | head -30
echo "---"
# Look at padframe-gen commands
ls /nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/commands/
echo "---"
# Check nc_socgen _entry for subcommands
cat /nc/apps/nc_socgen/nc_socgen/_entry.py | head -80

args.command:
# Check for a standalone verify tool / script

echo "---"
# Look at padframe-gen commands
ls /nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/commands/
echo "---"
